name: Potato Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Process the egg, onion, salt, flour, and baking powder in a bowl until combined.
2. Gradually add half of the cubed potatoes to the mixture and process briefly.
3. Add the remaining potatoes and process again, taking care not to over-process.
4. Heat a hot, well-greased griddle or skillet.
5. Using a ladle or cookie scoop, drop batter onto the hot griddle.
6. Cook until golden brown on both sides, about 2-3 minutes per side.
7. Remove from heat and drain on paper towels.
